query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

2.description: get 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get quick-clay hazard zones within Drammen municipality extent

4.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

6.description: calculate distance from each parcel to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with minimum distance to quick-clay

8.description: sort parcels by distance to quick-clay ascending
